---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Thoughts on data science, machine learning, and Python"
listing:
  contents: "."
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  max-description-length: 180
  date-format: medium
  grid-columns: 2
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
